description: A synchronous single-issuer io_uring HTTP/1.1 server on Minima's io_uring bindings, NativeAOT-compiled. One pinned reactor thread per core (SO_REUSEPORT, SINGLE_ISSUER|DEFER_TASKRUN); multishot accept + single-shot recv into per-connection buffers (parse-in-place); responses serialized straight into the send buffer; recv/send alternate fully inline — no async, no thread pool, no GC on the hot path. JSON serialized per request from the model.
